content_markdown:
A vibrating tuning fork is held above the top of a tube that is filled with water. The water gradually runs out of the tube until a maximum loudness of sound is heard.

Which of the following best shows the standing wave pattern set up in the tube at this position?

diagram_metadata.description: Four diagrams showing a vertical tube with water at the bottom and a standing wave envelope in the air column above. The water level is controlled by a tap at the bottom.

vibe_explanation: In a tube closed at one end (the water surface) and open at the other, resonance occurs when there is a displacement node at the closed end and a displacement antinode at the open end. Diagram C correctly shows an antinode (maximum amplitude) at the top opening and a node (zero amplitude) at the water surface.
